targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  observed_at AS time,
  strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  profile_id AS `Profil`,
  sum(exposure_usdc) AS `Exposition USDC`,
  sum(net_pnl_usdc) AS `PnL net USDC`,
  sum(costs_usdc) AS `Coûts USDC`
FROM prediction_core.paper_pnl_snapshots
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  )
GROUP BY time, strategy_id, profile_id
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  market_id AS `Marché`,
  strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  profile_id AS `Profil`,
  sum(quantity) AS `Quantité`,
  anyLast(avg_price) AS `Prix moyen`,
  anyLast(exposure_usdc) AS `Exposition USDC`,
  anyLast(status) AS `Statut`
FROM prediction_core.paper_positions
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  )
GROUP BY market_id, strategy_id, profile_id
ORDER BY `Exposition USDC` DESC

SELECT
  formatDateTime(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Observation (Paris)`,
  market_id AS `Marché`,
  side AS `Côté`,
  price AS `Prix`,
  size AS `Taille`,
  spend_usdc AS `Montant USDC`,
  status AS `Statut`,
  opening_fee_usdc AS `Frais ouverture USDC`,
  opening_slippage_usdc AS `Slippage ouverture USDC`,
  estimated_exit_cost_usdc AS `Coût sortie estimé USDC`
FROM prediction_core.paper_orders
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  )
ORDER BY observed_at DESC
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  status AS `Statut`,
  count() AS `Ordres`
FROM prediction_core.paper_orders
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  )
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY `Ordres` DESC

WITH live AS
(
  SELECT
    run_id,
    strategy_id,
    profile_id,
    market_id,
    token_id,
    anyLast(JSONExtractString(raw, 'order_id')) AS `Ordre live`,
    anyLast(event_type) AS `Statut live`,
    anyLast(JSONExtractFloat(raw, 'price')) AS `Prix live`,
    anyLast(JSONExtractFloat(raw, 'size')) AS `Taille live`,
    max(observed_at) AS live_observed_at
  FROM prediction_core.execution_events
  WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
    AND mode = 'live'
    AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  )
  GROUP BY run_id, strategy_id, profile_id, market_id, token_id
)
SELECT
  formatDateTime(toTimeZone(p.observed_at, 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Observation paper (Paris)`,
  formatDateTime(toTimeZone(live.live_observed_at, 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Observation live (Paris)`,
  p.run_id AS `Run / exécution`,
  p.market_id AS `Marché`,
  p.token_id AS `Token`,
  p.strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  p.profile_id AS `Profil`,
  p.paper_order_id AS `Ordre paper`,
  live.`Ordre live`,
  p.status AS `Statut paper`,
  live.`Statut live`,
  p.price AS `Prix paper`,
  live.`Prix live`,
  p.size AS `Taille paper`,
  live.`Taille live`,
  live.`Prix live` - p.price AS `Écart prix`,
  live.`Taille live` - p.size AS `Écart taille`
FROM prediction_core.paper_orders p
LEFT JOIN live
  ON p.run_id = live.run_id
 AND p.strategy_id = live.strategy_id
 AND p.profile_id = live.profile_id
 AND p.market_id = live.market_id
 AND p.token_id = live.token_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(p.observed_at)
  AND match(p.run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(p.strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(p.profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(p.market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(p.mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(p.observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(p.observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  )
ORDER BY p.observed_at DESC
LIMIT 500

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT run_id FROM prediction_core.paper_orders WHERE run_id != '' ORDER BY run_id
list.label: Run / exécution
list.name: run_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT run_id FROM prediction_core.paper_orders WHERE run_id != '' ORDER BY run_id
